title: Goa Tour Packages from Kolkata Starting From ₹15300 p.p
description: Book Goa tour packages from Kolkata! Enjoy sun-kissed beaches, thrilling nightlife, and North & South Goa sightseeing.

collectiondata.overview:
Best Tour Packages for Goa from India – Plan Your Perfect Beach Holiday​

If you’re searching for the best tour packages for Goa from India, you’re in the right place. Goa’s stunning beaches, vibrant nightlife, rich culture, and scenic beauty make it the perfect destination for families, couples, and solo travelers alike. Our specially designed Goa tour packages from various cities ensure you have a memorable, hassle-free vacation.
Written by TravelXploria, a best tour and travel company in India with over 12 years of experience curating customized Goa tour packages from India’s major cities. Recognized among the best domestic tour operators in India, we’re known for quality, flexibility, and traveler-first planning.

Why Choose Goa for Your Next Vacation?

Stunning Beaches and Vibrant Nightlife
Goa is world-famous for its golden sands and lively beach parties. Whether it’s the bustling Baga Beach or the serene Palolem, Goa offers a beach for every mood. The nightlife here is unmatched, with numerous clubs, pubs, and beach shacks to explore.
💡 Insider Tip: Visit Baga Beach early morning to enjoy peaceful walks before the crowds and try the local seafood shacks.

Rich Cultural Heritage and Festivals
Beyond beaches, Goa’s colonial architecture, colorful festivals like Carnival and Shigmo, and historic sites like the Basilica of Bom Jesus provide a deep cultural experience that enriches your holiday.
According to the Goa Tourism official website, the Carnival is held every February and showcases vibrant parades and music.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Solo Travelers
Whether you’re looking for peaceful family time, a romantic escape, or an adventurous solo trip, Goa’s diversity caters to all. Our budget-friendly Goa tour packages for families and affordable Goa tour packages for couples are tailored to fit your needs and budget.
You can also explore special Goa tour packages for couple with price details to help you plan within your travel budget.
Families can benefit from packages offering kid-friendly activities and comfortable accommodations with easy access to medical facilities.

Popular Tour Packages for Goa from India

3 Days Goa Weekend Tour Package from India

Perfect for a quick break, this package includes flights, hotel stays, and sightseeing covering key spots like Baga Beach and Panaji.

5 Days Goa Family Tour Package from India
Ideal for families, this package includes kid-friendly activities, comfortable accommodation, and visits to beaches, spice plantations, and waterfalls.

Goa Honeymoon Packages from India
Romantic stays, private dinners, and serene beaches are highlights of our best Goa honeymoon packages on a budget, making your special trip memorable without overspending. These packages are available from several Indian metros, including our specially designed honeymoon packages from Kolkata for couples departing from Eastern India.
💡 Pro Tip: Booking a honeymoon package that includes a candlelight beach dinner adds an unforgettable touch to your trip.

Customized Goa Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
We offer flexible itineraries and personalized tours for travelers coming from cities like Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Chennai, Bangalore, and Delhi.
Booking a Goa tour package with flight bundle often results in better prices and less hassle.

Top Attractions Covered in Goa Tour Packages

Baga and Calangute Beaches
The most popular beaches offering water sports, nightlife, and local markets.

Old Goa Churches and Basilica of Bom Jesus
​Explore Goa’s UNESCO World Heritage churches and colonial architecture.

Dudhsagar Waterfalls and Spice Plantations
Nature lovers can enjoy a refreshing trek and a visit to lush plantations.

Panaji City Tour and Local Markets
Experience Goa’s vibrant city life with its bustling markets, cafes, and colonial charm.

What’s Included in the Best Goa Tour Packages from India?

Accommodation and Meals
Stay options range from budget hotels to luxury resorts with breakfast and select meals included.
We carefully select hotels ensuring comfort, safety, and family-friendly amenities.

Airport Transfers and Local Transportation
Seamless pickups and drop-offs, with local transport arranged for sightseeing.

Guided Sightseeing and Adventure Activities
From heritage walks to water sports, packages cover a wide range of experiences.
Guided tours typically include knowledgeable local guides who enrich your visit with historical insights.

How to Book the Best Tour Packages for Goa from India

Trusted Travel Agents and Online Platforms
Choose reputed agents or platforms with verified reviews to ensure smooth booking and support.
Check for clear pricing, cancellation policies, and 24/7 customer service from only the best tour and travel company options.

Tips for Planning a Hassle-Free Goa Trip
Book flights and hotels in advance, pack for tropical weather, and keep your itinerary flexible to enjoy Goa’s spontaneous charm.
💡 Always have travel insurance and confirm airport transfers before arrival for stress-free travel.

Ready to plan your beach escape? Trust TravelXploria—recognized as one of the best tour and travel company in India—to deliver exceptional Goa tour experiences tailored for families, couples, and solo adventurers alike.

packages.overview:
Goa Tour Package – Quick Highlights

  • Arrival at Goa – Warm welcome and transfer to hotel/resort for check-in and relaxation.

  • Full Day North Goa Sightseeing – Explore famous beaches like Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, and Fort Aguada.

  • Full Day South Goa Sightseeing – Visit serene spots like Miramar Beach, Dona Paula, Mangueshi Temple, and Basilica of Bom Jesus.

  • Excursion to Dudhsagar Falls – A thrilling visit to the majestic waterfall nestled in the Western Ghats, with optional spice plantation tour.

  • 👋 Departure – Check-out and transfer to airport/railway station with sweet memories of Goa.

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on a fascinating North Goa tour. Visit the iconic Fort Aguada Lighthouse, explore the beaches of Candolim, Calangute, & Baga, and enjoy the scenic beauty of Anjuna and Vagator beaches. Don’t miss a visit to the historic Chapora Fort. After a day full of exploration, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a delightful South Goa tour. Visit the stunning Old Goa Churches, including the Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral, and explore the beautiful Mangueshi & Mahalaxmi Temples. Continue your journey through Margao, Miramar Beach, Donapaula, and the Panjim Church. After a day filled with history and culture, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dudhsagar Falls","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on a scenic drive to Dudhsagar Falls. Located in the Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park amidst the Western Ghats, these majestic falls mark the journey of the Mandovi River from the mountains to Panjim, where it meets the Arabian Sea. The area is surrounded by lush deciduous forests, home to rich biodiversity. While the falls may appear less dramatic during the dry season, they come alive during the monsoon, cascading into a massive sheet of water. Enjoy the natural beauty and serenity of the falls before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will assist you with your transfer to Goa Airport for your departure. We hope your stay has been truly memorable, and that you carry back a bundle of happy memories with you. It has been a pleasure to serve you, and we look forward to welcoming you on future journeys with Travelxploria. Safe travels.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Goa","to":"Goa Dabolim International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Leisure Day","day_summary":"

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

Enjoy the scenic beauty of Miramar Beach, visit the iconic Dona Paula viewpoint, and admire the architecture of Panjim Church. After a day filled with exploration and insights, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Leisure Day","day_summary":"

packages.overview:
• ​Goa: India’s beach paradise, known for its golden beaches, nightlife, Portuguese heritage, and adventure activities.
  • ​North Goa Sightseeing: Explore Aguada Fort, Baga Beach, Anjuna Beach, Vagator Beach, and the vibrant nightlife.​
  • South Goa Sightseeing: Visit serene beaches like Colva and Palolem, Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral, and spice plantations.
  • ​Dudhsagar Falls: Witness the breathtaking milky cascades surrounded by lush greenery and enjoy a jeep safari.​

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on an exciting North Goa tour. Explore the iconic Fort Aguada Lighthouse, followed by visits to the stunning beaches of Candolim, Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, and Vagator. Discover the historic Chapora Fort, offering breathtaking views of the coastline. After a day filled with exploration and scenic beauty, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on an enriching South Goa tour. Begin with a visit to the Old Goa Church, followed by the revered Mangueshi and Mahalaxmi Temples. Continue to Margao for a sightseeing tour before heading to the picturesque Miramar Beach and the scenic Dona Paula viewpoint. Conclude the day with a visit to the Panjim Church, soaking in the cultural and architectural beauty of the region. After a memorable day, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dudhsagar Falls","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on an exciting journey to Dudhsagar Falls with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Nestled within the Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park in the Western Ghats, these majestic falls mark a breathtaking point along the Mandovi River as it flows toward Panjim and meets the Arabian Sea. Surrounded by lush deciduous forests teeming with rich biodiversity, the falls offer a mesmerizing spectacle, especially during the monsoon season, when torrential rains transform them into a massive cascading sheet of water. Even during the dry season, the natural beauty of the area remains captivating. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience, enjoy this unforgettable encounter with nature before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria and our best on-ground support staff will assist you with a smooth transfer to Goa Airport for your departure. As your memorable journey comes to an end, we at Travelxploria hope that we have made your stay truly worthwhile, ensuring that you leave with a bundle of happy memories to cherish forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again on another incredible adventure.

it was an excellent trip to Vietnam very well coordinated by Bikram and team. Great Logistics even accommodating and making my trip memorable Great hotels Ground trips Vehicle pick up and drop politeness and punctual. answering calls promptly even in Vietnam wonderful sightseeing comfortable. Special thanks for making last arrangements for my daughter who joined us from Canada Tronto. Special arrangements on our 25th anniversary at no extra cost. Trip was economical too.

Their meticulous attention to detail, from communication and personalised service made all the difference. The itinerary was thoughtfully curated covering all the must see attractions and experiences that Singapore has to offer. we were impressed by Tavelxploria's professionalism, reliability and commitment to customer satisfaction. Thanks to their exceptional service and Riya maa'm for making our first foreign trip truly memorable and we can't wait to plan our next adventure with them.

{"title":"Bhaskar Chakraborty","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . The highlights of our trip was forest safari at Kaziranga National Park were we saw one horned rhinoceros .Travel Exploria did an amazing job with the hotel bookings ,coordinations and tour planning. We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

{"title":"Indranil Dey","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-01-22","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

This is the 2nd time my parents had a trip with Travelxploria, 1st time was Kashmir, this time was Kerela + Kanyakumari. They had an excellent experience. Both my parents are senior citizens, and they were taken utmost care at all the hotels wherever they had the night stay. They had a dedicated driver who provided end to end support from Kochi to Tiruvanthapuram. Almost all the tourist spots were covered which could be accessible by my parents. Me and my wife have full trust on Travelexporia without any anxiety.

I would always recommend Travelexporia for all my future trips of my parents and will also plan for myself as well.

Special thanks to Sudipto Metay who coordinated the tour.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404411-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404414-2.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404415-3.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404418-Untitled.jpg"]}],"destination":["India","Kerala"]}

{"title":"Swagata Chatterjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-11","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

{"title":"Aritra Basu","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-04-18","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We went for a girls trip to Thailand on 18th April with TravelXploria first time.From day one I talked to Mr. Sanjib for our trip and he did the best customised trip for us as per our requirement & choices. The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! Got all the info through my WhatsApp regarding cab timing, airport pickup n all. Only two things I didn't like . Hotel Ao nang timber house in krabi . Service is poor , no security guard n no receptionist after 8.00 pm &no basic toiletries .Another thing is the driver in bangkok was soo rude n rigid specially non cooperative. Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

I would definitely plan my upcoming tour with TravelXploria.

overview:
Best Tour Packages for Goa from India – Plan Your Perfect Beach Holiday​

If you’re searching for the best tour packages for Goa from India, you’re in the right place. Goa’s stunning beaches, vibrant nightlife, rich culture, and scenic beauty make it the perfect destination for families, couples, and solo travelers alike. Our specially designed Goa tour packages from various cities ensure you have a memorable, hassle-free vacation.
Written by TravelXploria, a best tour and travel company in India with over 12 years of experience curating customized Goa tour packages from India’s major cities. Recognized among the best domestic tour operators in India, we’re known for quality, flexibility, and traveler-first planning.

Why Choose Goa for Your Next Vacation?

Stunning Beaches and Vibrant Nightlife
Goa is world-famous for its golden sands and lively beach parties. Whether it’s the bustling Baga Beach or the serene Palolem, Goa offers a beach for every mood. The nightlife here is unmatched, with numerous clubs, pubs, and beach shacks to explore.
💡 Insider Tip: Visit Baga Beach early morning to enjoy peaceful walks before the crowds and try the local seafood shacks.

Rich Cultural Heritage and Festivals
Beyond beaches, Goa’s colonial architecture, colorful festivals like Carnival and Shigmo, and historic sites like the Basilica of Bom Jesus provide a deep cultural experience that enriches your holiday.
According to the Goa Tourism official website, the Carnival is held every February and showcases vibrant parades and music.

Ideal for Families, Couples, and Solo Travelers
Whether you’re looking for peaceful family time, a romantic escape, or an adventurous solo trip, Goa’s diversity caters to all. Our budget-friendly Goa tour packages for families and affordable Goa tour packages for couples are tailored to fit your needs and budget.
You can also explore special Goa tour packages for couple with price details to help you plan within your travel budget.
Families can benefit from packages offering kid-friendly activities and comfortable accommodations with easy access to medical facilities.

Popular Tour Packages for Goa from India

3 Days Goa Weekend Tour Package from India

Perfect for a quick break, this package includes flights, hotel stays, and sightseeing covering key spots like Baga Beach and Panaji.

5 Days Goa Family Tour Package from India
Ideal for families, this package includes kid-friendly activities, comfortable accommodation, and visits to beaches, spice plantations, and waterfalls.

Goa Honeymoon Packages from India
Romantic stays, private dinners, and serene beaches are highlights of our best Goa honeymoon packages on a budget, making your special trip memorable without overspending. These packages are available from several Indian metros, including our specially designed honeymoon packages from Kolkata for couples departing from Eastern India.
💡 Pro Tip: Booking a honeymoon package that includes a candlelight beach dinner adds an unforgettable touch to your trip.

Customized Goa Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
We offer flexible itineraries and personalized tours for travelers coming from cities like Ahmedabad, Mumbai, Chennai, Bangalore, and Delhi.
Booking a Goa tour package with flight bundle often results in better prices and less hassle.

Top Attractions Covered in Goa Tour Packages

Baga and Calangute Beaches
The most popular beaches offering water sports, nightlife, and local markets.

Old Goa Churches and Basilica of Bom Jesus
​Explore Goa’s UNESCO World Heritage churches and colonial architecture.

Dudhsagar Waterfalls and Spice Plantations
Nature lovers can enjoy a refreshing trek and a visit to lush plantations.

Panaji City Tour and Local Markets
Experience Goa’s vibrant city life with its bustling markets, cafes, and colonial charm.

What’s Included in the Best Goa Tour Packages from India?

Accommodation and Meals
Stay options range from budget hotels to luxury resorts with breakfast and select meals included.
We carefully select hotels ensuring comfort, safety, and family-friendly amenities.

Airport Transfers and Local Transportation
Seamless pickups and drop-offs, with local transport arranged for sightseeing.

Guided Sightseeing and Adventure Activities
From heritage walks to water sports, packages cover a wide range of experiences.
Guided tours typically include knowledgeable local guides who enrich your visit with historical insights.

How to Book the Best Tour Packages for Goa from India

Trusted Travel Agents and Online Platforms
Choose reputed agents or platforms with verified reviews to ensure smooth booking and support.
Check for clear pricing, cancellation policies, and 24/7 customer service from only the best tour and travel company options.

Tips for Planning a Hassle-Free Goa Trip
Book flights and hotels in advance, pack for tropical weather, and keep your itinerary flexible to enjoy Goa’s spontaneous charm.
💡 Always have travel insurance and confirm airport transfers before arrival for stress-free travel.

Ready to plan your beach escape? Trust TravelXploria—recognized as one of the best tour and travel company in India—to deliver exceptional Goa tour experiences tailored for families, couples, and solo adventurers alike.
